creator: nicole@unixgirl.com
text:
Tyan Board - H2000M S3992G3NR - New AMD chip Socket F
 Works well with 6 X 2 gig dimms, one 2210 Dual Core CPU, one SATA drive, SMP KERNEL.

 Running a memcached server. 
 All functions seem supported and running well.

How-To-Repeat: DMESG:
